description: block-api upsert dry-run parity (upsert-block-item). Library: add opts?:{dryRun?} to upsertItemInBlock (block-api.ts) -> *ForDir -> upsertItemInTypedFile; when dryRun, under the block lock read the array, compute the prospective whole block (append, or replace at matched idField index), AJV-validate it, and return {mode, dryRun:true} without writing. Op (ops-registry.ts upsert-block-item): declare dryRun + thread + would-message. Script: delete bespoke preview, call upsertItemInBlock with {dryRun:true}, print mode. CHANGELOG [Unreleased] bullet. Last of the five — parity-check reaches 0 divergences; FGAP-012 closes on this landing. Per DEC-0008 / FGAP-012.
acceptance_criteria: CLI upsert-block-item --dryRun --json returns {mode, dryRun:true} and leaves the block file byte-unchanged
a schema-violating prospective item fails the dry-run without writing
parity-check exits 0 with 0 divergences (all five gone)
fresh adversarial probe: no write, lock semantics correct, validation parity, real write still persists + stamps
FGAP-012 closed with the 4 closure fields
